_doc: Copy to ~/.config/session-digest/config.json and customize. Remove all _doc/_comment fields.
_output_dir_doc: REQUIRED for plain mode. Where daily digest files are saved. Supports ~ expansion.
_language_doc: Language for AI summaries. null = auto-detect from ~/.claude/settings.json. Values: 'en', 'uk', 'Ukrainska', etc.
_model_doc: Model for summarization. Set to null for offline mode (no API calls). WARNING: every session = 1 extra API request.
_min_turns_doc: Skip sessions with fewer user turns than this. Prevents trivial sessions from cluttering the digest.

obsidian._doc: Obsidian integration. Set enabled:true to write into your vault instead of plain files.
obsidian._vault_path_doc: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault. Example: '/Users/you/Documents/MyVault'
obsidian._daily_notes_dir_doc: Relative to vault root. Must match Obsidian Daily Notes plugin setting.
obsidian._date_format_doc: Daily note filename format. Must match Obsidian Daily Notes plugin setting.
obsidian._section_heading_doc: Markdown heading where session entries are inserted.
obsidian._wikilinks_doc: Wrap project names in [[...]] for Obsidian linking.
obsidian._template_path_doc: Path to daily note template. Leave empty to use built-in frontmatter.

daily_format._doc: Customize the format of digest entries.
daily_format._project_heading_doc: Template for project section heading. {project} is replaced with project name.
